#setwd("~/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/COLLABORATIVE/Do expensive brain regions increase less in humans/analyses_metabol_rate_structure")

## Install and Load up packages
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpmisc)  # for stat_poly_eq
library(tidyverse)

#here::i_am("R/stereology_cell_types_13022026.Rmd")

# Paths relative to project root:
r_dir      <- here("R")
data_dir   <- here("data")
output_dir <- here("output")

## ================================
## Volume Change vs rCMRGlc
## ================================

## ----------------
## Load data
## ----------------

data <- read.csv(here("data", "stress_volume.csv"), header = TRUE)

# Expected columns (in order):
# Region | rCMRGlc | all_adoptees | english_adoptees | romanian_adoptees

names(data) <- c(
  "anatomy_group",
  "rcmr_value",
  "norm_all",	
  "norm_english",	
  "norm_romanian",	
  "english_mean",	
  "english_sd",	
  "english_lci",	
  "english_uci",	
  "romanian_mean",	
  "romanian_sd",	
  "romanian_lci",	
  "romanian_uci",	
  "norm_mean",	
  "norm_sd",	
  "norm_lci",	
  "norm_uci"
)

# in data$anatomy_group, change "Accumbens" to "Nucleus accumbens"
data$anatomy_group <- gsub("Accumbens", "Nucleus accumbens", data$anatomy_group)

data$anatomy_group <- gsub("_", " ", data$anatomy_group)

## ----------------
## Reshape for plotting
## ----------------

plot_df <- data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(norm_all,	norm_english, norm_romanian),
    names_to = "group",
    values_to = "volume_change"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    group = recode(
      group,
      norm_all      = "Normative vs All adoptees",
      norm_english  = "Normative vs English adoptees",
      norm_romanian = "Normative vs Romanian adoptees"
    )
  )

## ----------------
## Color palette
## ----------------

regions <- sort(unique(plot_df$anatomy_group))
base_cols <- c(
  "#000000", "#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#009E73",
  "#F0E442", "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#CC79A7"
)

pal <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(base_cols)(length(regions))
names(pal) <- regions

## ----------------
## Plot
## ----------------

# Keep only rows with data for this plot and remove Total Brain
plot_df_clean <- plot_df %>%
  filter(
    anatomy_group != "Total Brain",
    !is.na(rcmr_value),
    !is.na(volume_change)
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

# Make palette match actual groups
pal_clean <- pal[names(pal) %in% levels(plot_df_clean$anatomy_group)]

# Then plot

ggplot(plot_df_clean, aes(x = rcmr_value, y = volume_change, color = anatomy_group)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    color = "steelblue"
  ) +
  stat_poly_eq(
    aes(label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.value.label.., sep = "*\", \"*")),
    formula = y ~ x,
    parse = TRUE,
    label.x = "right",
    label.y = "top",
    size = 4,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ group, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal) +
  labs(
    x = "rCMRGlc (µmol / 100 g / min)",
    y = "% Volume change (Normative - Adoptee Group)",
    color = "Region"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

## ================================
## Bar plots: Mean volumes ± CI
## One plot per brain region
## ================================

bar_df <- data %>%
  select(
    anatomy_group,
    english_mean, english_lci, english_uci,
    romanian_mean, romanian_lci, romanian_uci,
    norm_mean, norm_lci, norm_uci
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -anatomy_group,
    names_to = c("group", ".value"),
    names_sep = "_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    group = recode(
      group,
      english  = "English adoptees",
      romanian = "Romanian adoptees",
      norm     = "Normative"
    )
  )

ggplot(bar_df, aes(x = group, y = mean, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lci, ymax = uci),
    width = 0.18,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ anatomy_group, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean volume per hemisphere (cm³)",
    title = "Mean Brain Region Volumes with 95% Confidence Intervals"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "English adoptees"  = "#56B4E9",
      "Romanian adoptees" = "#D55E00",
      "Normative"         = "#999999"
    )
  ) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),   # hide x-axis labels
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),  # hide x-axis ticks
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
